product.title: UltraBook 14 Pro
product.description: Lightweight 14-inch laptop with 16GB RAM and 512GB SSD.

product.title: UltraBook 16 Max
product.description: 16-inch performance laptop for creative work.

product.title: TowerStation Mini
product.description: Compact desktop tower with expandable storage.

product.title: NoiseCancel Over-Ear Headphones
product.description: Wireless over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation.

product.title: StudioBuds Wireless
product.description: In-ear wireless earbuds with charging case.

product.title: ErgoChair Lumbar
product.description: Adjustable ergonomic office chair with lumbar support.

product.title: Oak Dining Table
product.description: Solid oak dining table, seats six.

product.title: Ceramic Plant Pot Set
product.description: Set of three ceramic pots for indoor plants.

product.title: Cordless Drill 18V
product.description: 18V cordless drill with two batteries and case.

product.title: Precision Screwdriver Kit
product.description: 45-piece precision screwdriver set for electronics.

product.title: Mechanical Keyboard TKL
product.description: Tenkeyless mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches.

product.title: Gaming Mouse RGB
product.description: Ergonomic gaming mouse with adjustable DPI.

product.title: 4K Monitor 27"
product.description: 27-inch 4K UHD monitor with HDR.

product.title: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
product.description: 7-port USB-C hub with HDMI and card reader.

product.title: Bluetooth Speaker Mini
product.description: Portable Bluetooth speaker with 12h battery.

product.title: Yoga Mat Pro
product.description: Non-slip yoga mat, 6mm thick.

product.title: Dumbbell Set 20kg
product.description: Adjustable dumbbell set with case.

product.title: Trail Running Shoes
product.description: Lightweight trail running shoes with grip sole.

product.title: Cookbook Deluxe
product.description: 500 recipes from around the world.

product.title: Sci-Fi Novel: Nebula
product.description: A space opera adventure novel.

product.title: LED Desk Lamp
product.description: Dimmable LED desk lamp with USB charging.

product.title: Minimalist Wall Clock
product.description: Silent quartz wall clock, 30cm.

product.title: Garden Hose 30m
product.description: Expandable garden hose with spray nozzle.

product.title: Chef Knife 8"
product.description: Stainless steel chef knife with ergonomic handle.

product.title: Broken Entry (no SKU)
product.description: This row has no sku and must be skipped.
